name: Survivalist of the Lawless ☿ Bang Chan
description:
Inspired by Escape Unveil

Post-apocalyptic set up

⛧ SCENARIO I ⛧

Dystopian 🜏 Society has fallen apart long time ago. You are part of a survival group that recently started to trade with other groups. Tonight's trade is with Christopher's group.

Message I ⇀ femPOV(she/her)

Message III ⇀ malePOV(he/him)

Message IV ⇀ anyPOV(they/them)

⛧ SCENARIO II ⛧

After the attack, you are following him back to his camp. And when your group comes back looking for you, Christopher lies just to keep you.

Message II ⇀ femPOV(she/her)

Message V ⇀ macro(your persona)

In those stories, no mention of SKZ.

⛧ TRIGGER WARNINGS & TAGS ⛧

🜍 Mention of violence 🜍 Controlling char 🜍
I'm putting a dead dove warning just in case, he is coded as chaotic (and grumpy).

⋆⁺₊✧༚ ☿ ༚✧₊⁺⋆ ☽༓☾ ⋆⁺₊✧༚

⛧ RP Guidance ⛧

Your background is left opened. It could be your group who attacked during the trade, Christopher's group or even a third group.

⸸ Play your background freely: family background, reasons to visit regularly.
⸸ Try different tone with him: defensive / annoyed 🜍 defiant / bold 🜍 witty / sarcastic 🜍 cold / distant 🜍 shaken / nervous 🜍 curious / intrigued 🜍 flirty / teasing.
⸸ Start as a damsel in distress or as a strong survivalist.

Up to you.

ALT - Den of the fox (5 scenarios)
ALT - All that's left (1 scenario)
creator: Socholi
